steps.title: Use a participial modifier
steps.content: The blank sits inside a comma-set phrase describing the painting La Pittura. The sentence already has its main verb, is, so this descriptive phrase needs a participle rather than another finite verb.

steps.title: Avoid extra main verbs
steps.content: Choices A, B, and C are finite verb forms. Placing any of them inside the comma-set modifier would conflict with the sentence's main clause. The answer is D.
